zh.lifeSummary: 當Constance de Bourgogne於1046年5月8日出生在法國布格-福朗-可特艾o-達迪喬時，她的父親Robert Ier duc de Bourgogne34歲，母親Hélie de Semur-en-Brionnais28歲。她於1065年與Count Hugh de Chalon-Sur-Saone II結婚。她去世於1093年1月在西班牙卡斯利亞-拉 曼哈托萊多托萊多享年46歲，埋葬在西班牙卡斯利亞 Y 利安利安薩哈奧。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bourgogne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Bourgoin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alphee, Alyre, Andre, Armand, Aurore, Celina, Emile, Gilberte, Jacques, Laurent, Lucienne, Olivier.

variant of Bourgouin (and, in North America, an altered form of this), a habitational name for someone from Burgundy (Old French Bourgogne), a region of eastern France having Dijon as its center. The area was invaded by the Burgundii, an ancient Germanic tribe from whom it takes its name, in about AD 480. The duchy of Burgundy, created in 877 by Charles II, King of the Western Franks, was extremely powerful in the later Middle Ages, especially under Philip the Bold (1342–1404; duke from 1363). Compare Bourgoyne and Bourguignon .

nameMeanings.name: Constance
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval form of the Late Latin name Constantia, which is either a feminine derivative of Constans ( see Constant ) or an abstract noun meaning ‘constancy’. This was a popular name among the Normans, and was borne by, amongst others, the formidable Constance of Sicily ( 1158–98 ), wife of the Emperor Henry VI .

en.lifeSummary: When Constance de Bourgogne was born on 8 May 1046, in Dijon, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France, her father, Robert Ier duc de Bourgogne, was 34 and her mother, Hélie de Semur-en-Brionnais, was 28. She married Count Hugh de Chalon-Sur-Saone II in 1065. She died in January 1093, in Toledo, Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Spain, at the age of 46, and was buried in Sahagún, León, Castilla y León, Spain.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Constance de Bourgogne est née le 8 mai 1046, à Dijon, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France, son père, Robert Ier duc de Bourgogne, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Hélie de Semur-en-Brionnais, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé Count Hugh de Chalon-Sur-Saone II en 1065. Elle est décédée en janvier 1093, à Toledo, Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Espagne, à l’âge de 46 ans, et a été enterrée à Sahagún, León, Castilla y León, Espagne.

de.Sahagun, León, Castilla y León, Spain: Sahagún, León, Castilla y León, Spanien
de.lifeSummary: Als Constance de Bourgogne am 8. Mai 1046 in Dijon, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert Ier duc de Bourgogne 34 und ihre Mutter Hélie de Semur-en-Brionnais 28. Sie hat 1065 Count Hugh de Chalon-Sur-Saone II geheiratet. Sie starb im Januar 1093 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Toledo, Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Spanien und wurde in Sahagún, León, Castilla y León, Spanien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Constance de Bourgogne è nata il il 8 maggio 1046 nel Dijon, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia, sua padre, Robert Ier duc de Bourgogne, aveva 34 anni e sua madre, Hélie de Semur-en-Brionnais, aveva 28 anni. Lei sposato Count Hugh de Chalon-Sur-Saone II nel 1065. Morì nel gennaio 1093, nel Toledo, Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Spagna, all'età di 46 anni, e fu sepolta a Sahagún, León, Castilla y León, Spagna.

ko.lifeSummary: Constance de Bourgogne(이)가 1046년 5월 8일 프랑스 부르고그니-프랭체-코트e co테-드'어 디조에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert Ier duc de Bourgogne(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Hélie de Semur-en-Brionnais(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 1065년 Count Hugh de Chalon-Sur-Saone II(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1093년 1월 스페인 카스틸라-라 먼차 톨도 톨도에서 46세의 나이로 사망했으며 스페인 카스틸라 와이 레o 레o 사하그u에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com Count Hugh de Chalon-Sur-Saone II em 1065. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Constance de Bourgogne родилась 8 мая 1046 г. в местности диджон, кoте-д'ор, бургогне-фрэнче-комтe, Франция, её отцу по имени Robert Ier duc de Bourgogne было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Hélie de Semur-en-Brionnais, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Count Hugh de Chalon-Sur-Saone II в 1065 г. Она умерла январь 1093 г. в местности толедо, толедо, кастилла-ла манча, Испания в возрасте 46 лет и была похоронена в местности сахагuн, леoн, кастилла и леoн, Испания.

Se casó con Count Hugh de Chalon-Sur-Saone II en 1065. Murió en enero de 1093, en Toledo, Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, España, a la edad de 46 años, y fue sepultada en Sahagún, León, Castilla y León, España.
